title: GEAR AID Aquaseal FD Flexible Repair Adhesive for Outdoor Gear and Vinyl, Clear
short_description: Repair ripped or torn waders, wetsuits, inflatables, boots and all your outdoor gear with Aquaseal FD. It’s a flexible, durable adhesive that’s waterproof and bonds to all types of outdoor fabrics. This clear, rubber glue cures in 8-12 hours and is ideal for fixing pinhole leaks and tears on watersports and fishing gear. As a multipurpose fabric repair adhesive that’s waterproof, it keeps you dry and offers excellent abrasion resistance to keep gear protected from scrapes and scratches. When you rip your waders or tear your wetsuit, fix it with Aquaseal FD.

Use it as a fabric and vinyl repair adhesive to patch holes and seal leaks; cures in 8-12 hours to a flexible urethane rubber (available in 0.75 oz or 8 oz tube)

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Ripstop Nylon Repair Tape for Fabric and Vinyl, 3" x 20"
short_description: Use Tenacious Tape to fix holes and tears quickly on technical and synthetic fabrics including vinyl, nylon, rubber and plastic gear. It’s a peel-and-stick, weatherproof repair tape that’s washable and won’t peel over time. It sticks to jackets, tents, and tarps; staying put no matter what Mother Nature dishes out. Instantly make a tent repair with Tenacious Tape in ripstop nylon or clear tape for a barely noticeable solution. Tenacious Tape also comes in a tough, flexible nylon fabric strip for jackets and other camping gear. Do not use on cotton or natural fabrics. For inflatables and sleeping pads requiring heavy duty fixes, use puncture-resistant Tenacious Tape Flex Patches. When outdoor gear gets ripped or torn, Tenacious Tape will handle it – allowing you to stay outside longer.

title: GEAR AID Aquaseal SR Shoe and Boot Repair Adhesive, Clear Glue, 1 oz
short_description: Fix footwear permanently with Aquaseal SR, a shoe and boot repair glue that dries as a strong rubber and lasts for years. Previously known as Freesole, this durable adhesive can be used to create durable toe protectors, re-build worn out heels, and save soles from delamination. The tough formula is unaffected by heat or cold, so your shoe repair will withstand the elements at a jobsite, athletic field or mountaintop. From rubber and leather boots to tennis shoes and everything in between, repair your footwear with Aquaseal SR.

Diamond files are ideal for metal working, gold, silver, platinum, and other hard to file materials. The small handles allow for precision detail work, as they are not oversize or hard to grip in your fingertips. title: SE GP3-SS20 Black Prospector's Choice Plastic Sand Scoop For Metal Detecting

aspects.California Prop 65 Warning: This product may contain chemicals known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects or other reproductive harm

short_description: The SE GP3-SS20 Prospector Series Black Sand Scoop for Metal Detecting is great for collecting, detecting, and searching for various objects in the sand. This item is lightweight for scooping up sand to shake out treasures. It is easy to find treasure since the plastic does not interfere with metal detection. This sand scoop is deal for hunting on dry, sandy beaches. How to use: (1) Use your metal detector to locate the target area. (2) Scoop up target area sand in our sand scoop and run metal detector over the scoop.

title: GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent (DWR) Spray for Reproofing Jackets

aspects.California Prop 65 Warning: Select...

short_description: Restore the protective DWR (durable water repellency) coating on high-tech rainwear or snow gear with Revivex Durable Water Repellent. This spray-on treatment repels water, oil and stains. It can also be used for tent reproofing. Over time the DWR of outerwear and camp gear wears off. Regular reproofing treatment of jackets, tents, and other gear is highly recommended. The durable formula creates a water repellent coating that stays on even after a wash. Choose the size that’s right for you (10.5 oz or 16.9 fl oz) and ensure peak performance by pre-washing garments with Revivex Pro Cleaner. This formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable fabrics like event®, NeoShell®, and GORE-TEX® fabric.

title: Green 8 Inch Gold Mining Pan for Gold Prospecting 2 Riffle Types
short_description: Trap gold while gold prospecting with this Professional 8 Inch Gold Pan! The Professional Gold Pan features riffled traps to catch your gold as the lighter material flows out of the pan, a wide textured bottom for efficient separation of your remaining black sands and deep green color to highlight even fine gold in the bottom of your pan. The 2 different types of riffles (shallow and deep) will allow you to sift pieces of gold and other heavy minerals. This light weight but super tough pan is a top-quality gold-getter and will hold up to years of prospecting!.

short_description: Restore the protective DWR (durable water repellency) coating on high-tech rainwear or snow gear with Revivex Durable Water Repellent. This spray-on treatment repels water, oil and stains. It can also be used for tent reproofing. Over time the DWR of outerwear and camp gear wears off. Regular reproofing treatment of jackets, tents, and other gear is highly recommended. The durable formula creates a water repellent coating that stays on even after a wash. Choose the size that’s right for you (10.5 oz or 16.9 fl oz) and ensure peak performance by pre-washing garments with Revivex Pro Cleaner. This formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable fabrics like event®, NeoShell®, and GORE-TEX® fabric.

title: Gold Rush Sifting Classifier Sieve Mini 6 Inch Prospect Pan 30 Holes per Sq Inch
short_description: These sand and gravel screens are made of tough, high-impact plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh. Since each classifier is only 6" in diameter, it's great for beginners, stores easily and is stackable! Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or "classifying" material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost. In addition, looking through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold!.

title: GEAR AID Camo Form Self-Cling Reusable Camouflage Wrap 2" x 144", Various Colors
short_description: The Camo Form Self-Cling Wrap instantly camouflages firearms, knife handles, binoculars, flashlights and more. Besides covering gear, it quiets clanking objects and protects it from scratches in the field. One roll (2”x144”) is all you need to cover a standard rifle. Previously a Mcnett Tactical product, this reusable fabric wrap leaves no sticky residue when removed and is washable for multiple use. Camo Form conforms to almost any shape and adds grip and shield hands from hot or cold surfaces to protect you and your equipment. With a variety of popular patterns available, you’ll be sure to find the right camouflage to match any outdoor environment.

title: GEAR AID Aquaseal FD Flexible Durable Repair Adhesive, Cure Accelerator, 0.75 oz
short_description: Repair ripped or torn waders, wetsuits, inflatables, boots and all your outdoor gear faster with Aquaseal FD and Cure Accelerator. This repair kit gets you back into the water within two hours. The flexible, durable adhesive is waterproof and bonds to all types of outdoor fabrics and creates a permanent seal that doesn’t peel or crack. The Cure Accelerator speeds up cure time (normally 8-12 hours) and can also be used as a cleaner to remove tar, sap, glue and other resins from fabric. Use Aquaseal FD and Cure Accelerator together so repairs are quick and simple.

short_description: Ni Glo is a glow in the dark keychain perfect for marking SCUBA tanks and outdoor gear. Like a reusable mini glow stick, this gear marker is rechargeable and makes a useful camping accessory. Simply attach it to keys, backpacks, fishing rods or tents and watch it glow bright green for two hours. It then fades to a constant glow that lasts throughout the night. To recharge, expose it directly to sunlight or indoor light. For best results, charge under the sun for two hours. Small and lightweight, it’s a convenient marker for trails and dive sites. Whatever outdoor activity you’re into, Ni Glo will mark the way.

(1) Classification is the most important step in gold recovery (2) Screen off large, worthless gravel and rock (3) Size your material to the proper dimensions of the gold you are expecting to recover (4) The high-quality stainless steel wire mesh is both accurate and durable for everyday use (5) The plastic is both lightweight and durable Why Choose SE’s Stackable Design? title: GEAR AID Revivex Cleaner & Conditioner for BCD SCUBA and Dive Equipment 10 fl oz
short_description: Easily clean and condition this dive equipment with Revivex BCD Cleaner (previously known as B.C. Life). With each dive, the buoyancy compensator device (B.C.D.) is exposed to salt, chlorine and organic compounds that can damage it. This complete and balanced maintenance system effectively removes salt and chlorine crystals from the inside of the bladder and breaks down the same damaging particles on the outside. Extend the life of all B.C.D. parts, from rubber fittings and valves to the shell, with Revivex B.C.D. Cleaner.

Due to its simplicity and portability, this is a great sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike!.

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches for Silicone Tent, Tarp Repair, 3"x5"
short_description: Quickly patch up silnylon tents and tarps with Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches. Apply these peel-and-stick patches to permanently repair all types of silnylon and nylon gear including hammocks, backpacks and stuff sacks. Made of strong, ripstop nylon fabric and backed by a waterproof silicone-based adhesive, this repair kit includes two 3” x 5” sheer patches to blend with all colors – creating a clean and translucent repair. Like all Tenacious Tape, these patches are weatherproof and washable, so repairs won’t peel back over time. Only silicone adhesives bond to silicone, so these patches are a simple solution to ripped or torn silicone-treated gear. Fix torn, ultralight gear fast without the mess using Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches.

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Wildlife Patches for Jackets, Tent, Gear Repair 3" x 20"
short_description: Quickly make a jacket, tent or outerwear repair and say goodbye to holes and tears with Tenacious Tape Gear Patches. This versatile black nylon repair tape requires no heat or sewing skills. Simply peel the backing and apply to the surface with pressure; it won’t peel or lift even after a wash. The various shapes and sizes make jacket repair fun and personal. Stick it on almost anything made of synthetic fabrics including rainwear, ski pants, gloves and backpacks without the gooey residue (not for cotton, denim, or natural fabrics). When sewing and ironing isn’t an option, use Tenacious Tape Gear Patches for a unique and speedy repair that lasts all year long.

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Iron-On Neoprene Wetsuit Repair Patch, 6"x 10", Black
short_description: Extend the life of neoprene gear and fix it when it rips using Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch. Simply just cut the 10”x6” patch to size and activate it using an iron to create a permanent repair for neoprene waders, wetsuits and more. Previously known as Iron Mend, this iron-on fabric patch kit can be used to reinforce seams and high-wear areas including elbows, knees and underarms. It’s also designed to repair other stretchy fabrics like spandex and Lycra. For ultra-stretch repair that lasts, use Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch.

title: GEAR AID Seam Grip FC Fast Cure Sealant for Tents, Clear, 2 fl oz, 2 pack
short_description: Seam Grip FC is a fast-curing, water-based seam sealant. Previously known as Seam Sure, one (2 fl oz) bottle of this liquid sealer covers up to 60 ft of seams – making it perfect for family-sized tents, rainflies, tarps and pop-ups made of nylon, vinyl and more. Just apply a thin film to the inside seams and allow to dry. Don’t let rain make you miserable on your next outdoor adventure. Seal out the weather by waterproofing your tent and rainfly with Seam Grip FC and stop leaks before they happen.

title: ASR Outdoor Riffled Rubber Sluice Box Matting. 27" x 10"
short_description: Our Trimmable Sluice Box Matting is Made of TPR Plastic and is Designed with 3 Traditional & Proven Gold-Collecting Riffle Patterns within its channel, including Hungarian, V-shape, and square. The different styles allow for various sizes. The large groves allow for catching small fines, pickers, and small nuggets. This item can fit in a 10” metal sluice box, and you can trim it by cutting along the line to fit in a 8” metal sluice box. It is the perfect mat for superb fine gold recovery with fast or slow water and will enhance your prospecting adventure!.

short_description: Whether you're an avid gold prospector or just dipping your toe into this fun outdoor hobby, you definitely need a sluice box if you want to ensure the best prospecting experience. The ASR Outdoor Pocket-sized Gold Sluice Box is a great addition to any seasoned prospector's collection of trusty essentials as well as a great first-time sluice box option for beginners. The gold sluice box is a preferred method of panning for many gold prospectors due to the fact that they are capable of handling a larger volume of material than simpler methods like a rocker box or traditional gold pan.
feature_bullets: Ideal for Fine Gold Recovery: Perfect for testing new creeks, streams, riverbeds and gold-bearing material before hauling larger prospecting equipment, this pocket sluice helps separate fine gold, flakes, black sand and small precious minerals from unwanted sediment

TRADITIONAL AND PROVEN RIFFLES: Features Hungarian, V-shaped and square riffle patterns designed to help slow material flow, trap gold and improve recovery. The multi-riffle design gives prospectors a practical setup for working different material sizes and water conditions

DURABLE LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Made from high quality TPR plastic, this compact sluice is lightweight, flexible and easy to pack for hiking, camping, backpacking, and outdoor prospecting trips. The durable material is built for repeated field use in wet or rugged conditions

BEGINNER FRIENDLY: Simple to use and easy to transport, this mini sluice box is a great choice for beginners, kids, hobby prospectors and experienced gold hunters who want a quick field sampling tool for scouting new locations and processing small amounts of paydirt or concentrates

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Repair for Tents and Vinyl, Clear Roll, 1.5"x 60"
short_description: Use Tenacious Tape to fix holes and tears quickly on technical and synthetic fabrics including vinyl, nylon, rubber and plastic gear. It’s a peel-and-stick, weatherproof repair tape that’s washable and won’t peel over time. It sticks to jackets, tents, and tarps; staying put no matter what Mother Nature dishes out. Instantly make a tent repair with Tenacious Tape in ripstop nylon or clear tape for a barely noticeable solution. Tenacious Tape also comes in a tough, flexible nylon fabric strip for jackets and other camping gear. Do not use on cotton or natural fabrics. For inflatables and sleeping pads requiring heavy duty fixes, use puncture-resistant Tenacious Tape Flex Patches. When outdoor gear gets ripped or torn, Tenacious Tape will handle it – allowing you to stay outside longer.

title: Emergency Sleeping Bag Mylar Insulated Heat Light Weight 84x36 Inch
short_description: This Emergency Sleeping Bag is ideal for not only survival and emergency preparedness, but emergency training and more! The sleeping bag will give you a powerful pocketful of warmth. The unique reflective material maintains up to 90% of your radiant body heat to help preserve crucial warmth in survival and training situations. This bag tapes at the sides and is large enough to cover you from head to toe, yet small enough to fit in a pocket when folded up. Measuring 84 x 36 inches, these bags are also waterproof and windproof. Not only can they be used as sleeping bags, they can also act as an emergency ground cover or reflectors.

short_description: Extract damaged screws easily with the Universal Tool Damaged Screw Extractor Set! This set comes with 4 drill bits, each with a shank size of 3/8" that can be used with a reverse driver variable speed drill to extract damaged screws. They are constructed of stainless steel and have 63-65 bit hardness. They come in 4 assorted sizes - 1 through 4. These are very simple to use. First you need to locate a threaded or damaged crew head, and then with the drill in reverse drive, use side 1 to create a smooth cavity within the damaged head. With the drill still in reverse drive, insert side 2 into the cavity and begin to extract the screw.

short_description: Mildew smell, body odor, and other unpleasant scents can ruin expensive gear. Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the bacteria causing the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra® and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.
narrative: Mildew smell, body odor, and other unpleasant scents can ruin expensive gear. Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the bacteria causing the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra® and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

title: GEAR AID Seam Grip FC Fast Cure Sealant for Tents, Clear, 2 fl oz
short_description: Seam Grip FC is a fast-curing, water-based seam sealant. Previously known as Seam Sure, one (2 fl oz) bottle of this liquid sealer covers up to 60 ft of seams – making it perfect for family-sized tents, rainflies, tarps and pop-ups made of nylon, vinyl and more. Just apply a thin film to the inside seams and allow to dry. Don’t let rain make you miserable on your next outdoor adventure. Seal out the weather by waterproofing your tent and rainfly with Seam Grip FC and stop leaks before they happen.

short_description: This Disappearing Note Pad looks like ordinary paper, but is unique in that it dissolves in just seconds when contacted with liquid! This will result in a useless, non-reconstructable mulch which is far more secured than the output of any standard shredder. You can write on this paper normally, but as soon as it comes into contact with liquid (even saliva) it will transform into a secure mulch. This makes it ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice! A great use for this note pad is "Reflection Paper".

short_description: The SE Prospector’s Choice Pocket Sized Sluice Box is portable sized and easily fits in your backpack or bag. Bring it along on your prospecting adventure! It is easy to transport and has 3 riffle styles within its channel, including Hungarian, V-shape, and square. The Hungarian riffle increases the turbulence behind the riffle, which agitates the sand bed, improving gold recovery. The "V" shaped riffles work very well for catching fine gold. Our square riffles catch small nuggets of gold exceptionally well between its larger grooves. Use this sluice box to help classify and filter out gold and get rid of the dirt, gravel, and unwanted sediment. SE is committed to providing the customer with the best source for value possible on the market.

short_description: Every responsible firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your weapons clean. With the ASR Outdoor 24 Piece Gun Cleaning Kit, you can ensure that your firearms are clean, polished, rust-free and dependable. This set comes with 14 gun cleaning tools to keep your firearms in top shape. Inside the kit, you'll find 9 different sized brass punches, 3 double-ended bristle brushes, and 2 double-ended nylon picks. Brass punches are used to drive pins that hold guns together without marring the surface. The 3 brushes each have different bristle types for a variety of abrasiveness (copper, nylon, and brass) which will help remove rust, paint and other debris from your firearms.

title: Seam Grip SIL Silicone Sealant and Silnylon Patches for Silnylon Tents and Tarps

aspects.Features: Seal up to 24 ft of seams with 1.5 oz of Seam Grip

short_description: Seam Grip SIL is specially formulated for sealing seams on tents and other products constructed or coated with silicone waterproofing. Previously known as SIL Net, this clear sealant dries to a flexible rubber that bonds on all silicone-treated gear including ultralight tents and backpacks. One tube can seal most two-person tents. For faster repair options, choose the Kit, which includes the Seam Grip SIL adhesive with two Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches. These peel-and-stick patches are also backed by a silicone-based adhesive, so you can patch holes and go. Remember: only silicone will adhere to silicone. Seal out the weather properly with Seam Grip SIL and/or Tenacious Tape Silnylon Patches.

title: Universal 5pc Hobby Tweezer Set Stainless Steel
short_description: These stainless steel tweezers are all between 4" and 5" and feature different tips for different uses. The shovel tip on the stamp tweezers is perfect for handling flat broad objects that may be too delicate for pointed tweezers. The bent tip tweezers are designed for grasping small stones and components, while the solder/utility tweezers are ideal for holding small wires in place. Having 5 different tweezers makes this set quite versatile, as there is one for any situation. Whether you're beading, soldering, repairing watches or jewelry, or even simply removing a splinter, there is a tweezer in this set for you.

title: GEAR AID Silicone Grease, Rubber Conditioner and Lubricant for Dive Gear 0.25 oz
short_description: Silicone Grease by GEAR AID lubricates dive gear by soaking deeply into rubber surfaces. It also conditions everything from O-rings to pressure systems and valve systems; protecting expensive equipment from cracking and drying. This multipurpose lubricant helps seal out water and can be used on underwater cameras, waterproof dive lights, pressure systems and more. Reduce damage caused by the elements and keep gear performing at its best, use Silicone Grease regularly before or after a watersports trip.

short_description: The Revivex Wash and DWR Care Kit for GORE-TEX fabrics includes everything you need to keep high-tech gear looking good. Afterwards, add or restore water repellency on jackets, waders, gloves, and other waterproof breathable fabrics using Revivex Wash-In or Durable. Choose a kit with Tenacious Tape Mini Patches so when holes and rips make an appearance, just peel-and-stick for a repair that lasts. Keep gear in tip-top shape with the Revivex Wash and DWR Care Kit.

It's constructed of super hard (like diamond) ceramic material that will not wear out, rust or dull. It's ideal for creating sparks from ferrocerium or for shaving/scraping magnesium. It will also sharpen a dull knife. This is a must-have accessory for any bug out bag or survival kit!.

Treat ski and rain gear with this concentrated water repellent all season long. As a fluorocarbon-free formula it’s effective to use on all high-performance gear including GORE-TEX jackets and pants. Just add one ounce per garment to your sink or washing machine and do not rinse garments after treatment. Tumble dry for maximum effectiveness. Outerwear will shed water without impacting breathability. With Revivex Wash-In Water Repellent it’s easy to stay warm and dry.

short_description: Are you an avid outdoor adventurer? Then you absolutely need to add ASR Outdoor Elastic Shock Cord to your outdoor essentials. This super-strong shock cord is great for tying down outdoor gear, stringing and tethering items, tightening tarps or hammocks and more. Shock cord is awesome due to its versatility. It's designed to absorb shock and holds things nicely in place, making it ideal for transporting items, making a running dog leash, tying boats to docks, fixing tents, crafting and hobbies - you name it and shock cord can do it. The ASR Outdoor Shock Cord is made of 100% natural rubber and comes with 30 feet of cord, so whether you're moving heavy stuff, kayaking, camping or hiking this is the right cord for you.

title: GEAR AID 550 Paracord and Carabiner 7 Strand Utility, Camping, Reflective, 30 ft
short_description: Bring this versatile 550 Paracord on your next outdoor adventure. Use it as a utility cord, survival bracelet, or tie-down rope. Made of 100% nylon, the 7-strand cord is strong enough to withstand the elements and can be untied for other uses at camp. Available in camo, orange, and reflective black and orange, it’s a cord that can easily be seen outside and used for all types of jobs. When used with the carabiner, packs, lanterns and provisions are quickly suspended and off the ground – making camp organization stress-free.

title: SE JT114RS 10" Aluminum Ring Stick
short_description: Make sure you're sizing your rings correctly with the Universal Hobby Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick! This ring stock features both US and European sizes, making it a perfect tool for professional and hobby jewelry makers alike. The overall length is 10", so it will fit in most tool boxes and crafting carry cases. The US sizes are 1-15 (13mm - 24mm) and the European sizes are 41-76. It even has International sizes 1-36, so you'll be able to size just about any ring accurately. It's constructed of solid aluminum so you can count on it for years to come. Make sure you have one of these with your jewelry making tools for sizing, enlarging and reshaping rings!.

This shampoo cleans and conditions suits by removing organic residues like algae and bacteria as well as chlorine and salt deposits. The result is neoprene gear that smells fresh, stays supple and lasts much longer. It’s also safe to use on booties, gloves, fishing waders and GORE-TEX fabric. With Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo it has never been easier to extend the life of costly suits.

title: GEAR AID Revivex Odor Eliminator for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 2 fl oz
short_description: Mildew smell, body odor, and other unpleasant scents can ruin expensive gear. Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the bacteria causing the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra® and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Apply it to tents, boat covers, kayaks, rubber boots; anything you use or play with outside to prevent cracking, discoloration and fading. To keep gear looking good, apply Revivex UV Protectant before or after sun exposure.

title: GEAR AID Revivex Odor Eliminator for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 10 fl oz
short_description: Mildew smell, body odor, and other unpleasant scents can ruin expensive gear. Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the bacteria causing the odor. Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. Use formula within 72 hours of adding water. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra® and cotton. Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Restore loft and warmth while preserving the natural oils in down gear with this gentle down detergent. Just one down wash per season will keep your feathered-insulated gear fresh, lofty and warm. title: GEAR AID Akua Blunt Tip Paddle Knife with 3" Serrated Blade, Sheath Green/Black
short_description: Paddle down the river with the Akua Blunt Tip Knife attached securely to your PFD, boat deck, or leg. With its compact, yet tough 3” titanium-coated blade and blunt tip, you have an effective cutting and prying tool that won’t puncture inflatables. In case of an emergency, cut your way free with the serrated blade or cord cutter. Weighing less than 6 ounces, it’s a lightweight and versatile river/rescue knife that can be mounted almost anywhere. Flip it over to use the glass breaker for getting out of a jam. Also includes a bottle opener for beverages. Take on your next freshwater adventure with the Akua at your side.

title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape No-Sew Mini Repair Patches for Jackets, Tents 1.5"x2.5"
short_description: Use Tenacious Tape to fix holes and tears quickly on technical and synthetic fabrics including vinyl, nylon, rubber and plastic gear. It’s a peel-and-stick, weatherproof repair tape that’s washable and won’t peel over time. It sticks to jackets, tents, and tarps; staying put no matter what Mother Nature dishes out. Instantly make a tent repair with Tenacious Tape in ripstop nylon or clear tape for a barely noticeable solution. Tenacious Tape also comes in a tough, flexible nylon fabric strip for jackets and other camping gear. Do not use on cotton or natural fabrics. For inflatables and sleeping pads requiring heavy duty fixes, use puncture-resistant Tenacious Tape Flex Patches. When outdoor gear gets ripped or torn, Tenacious Tape will handle it – allowing you to stay outside longer.

short_description: The ToolTreaux 3pc large tweezer set comes with 3 different sizes of oversize tweezers - 8”, 10”, and 12” in length. These jumbo-sized tweezers are great for grabbing hard-to-reach items and offer a more sturdy grip than traditional small tweezers. Each tweezer features a serrated tip with a tapered blunt designed to securely hold on to tiny objects. You can count on them to grip and place small items during hobby and crafting projects like jewelry making, metalworking, and woodworking. These tweezers have a non-slip grip that allows for a comfortable, tight pinch.

title: GEAR AID Seam Grip TF Tent Fabric Sealer for Waterproofing, Clear, 4 fl oz
short_description: Use Seam Grip TF as a tent sealer to restore the polyurethane coating (PU) on a tent floor. Over time, tent waterproofing wears out and begins to flake off. Previously known as Tent Sure, a 4 fl oz bottle of Seam Grip TF restores tent floors to like-new condition and treats up to 85 sq. ft. of material. With its built-in foam applicator brush and non-toxic formula, seam sealing is safe and hassle-free. Easily apply it to any synthetic fabric you want to waterproof such as a rain fly, rain gear, awning or boat cover. When tent flies get sticky or seams start peeling, make them waterproof again with Seam Grip TF Tent Fabric Sealant.

title: Waterproof Field Notebook Pocket Size 3x5 with Pencil 50 Sheet Outdoor Pad
short_description: Now your notebook can go anywhere with you! Introducing the waterproof, smudge-poof, pocket-sized notebook from SE. Whether your'e camping, hiking, boating, fishing, or swimming, you can record anything into this journal without having to worry about it getting wet or smearing. This notebook is compact and easy to transport and store at 3" x 5", but still has a full 50 sheets! It can easily be carried in any bag, backpack or pocket. The bright green cover makes it easy to spot and ideal for signalling in emergencies. Notebook includes a compact graphite pencil. Whether its rain, hail, or snow, this notebook has you covered!.
narrative: Take notes anywhere, in any weather, with this compact waterproof pocket notebook from SE. Designed for outdoor use, field notes, camping, hiking, fishing, boating, hunting, survival kits, emergency preparedness and everyday carry, this durable 3" x 5" notebook lets you write down important information without worrying about rain, splashes or damp conditions ruining your notes.

The waterproof pages are designed to resist smudging and moisture, making this small field notebook ideal for use in wet, rugged or unpredictable environments. Whether you are recording trail notes, fishing spots, campsite details, measurements, weather observations, emergency information or quick reminders, this notebook is built to go wherever your adventure takes you.

Its compact pocket-size design makes it easy to carry in a backpack, tackle box, tool bag, glove compartment, survival pouch, camping kit or shirt pocket. Despite its small size, the notebook includes 50 sheets, giving you plenty of space for notes while keeping your gear lightweight and organized.

The bright green cover is easy to spot in a bag or outdoor setting and can also help with visibility in emergency situations. A compact graphite pencil is included, so you have a ready-to-use writing tool right out of the package.

From rain and snow to boating, hiking and jobsite use, this SE waterproof pocket notebook is a practical choice for outdoor enthusiasts, field workers, campers, anglers, hunters, backpackers and anyone who needs reliable notes on the go.

short_description: The SE Prospector's Choice 7 PC Beginners Gold Panning Kit has the essential tools you need for every gold panning and prospecting adventure. You can easily classify your findings with the sifting and dual-riffled pans. The dual riffles catch gold flakes, and the mesh sifting pan allows you to screen off rock and gravel. You can use the tweezer-magnifier and the snifter bottle to retrieve small size units, then store your valuables in the transparent glass vials for safekeeping. To use the snifter bottle, simply squeeze it to create a vacuum inside, so the submerged gold can easily be sucked up through the tube. SE is committed to providing the customer with the best source for value possible on the market.

title: Heavy Duty Flat Nail Puller Forged Steel Cats Paw Carpenters 15 Inches
short_description: The Universal Tool 15 inch Flat Nail Puller is a great addition to any tool collection. This nail puller is constructed of forged steel, has a width of 35mm and is 6mm thick. Nail pullers are an essential carpenter's tool, specially designed to grip nail heads. This nail puller is essential for demolition work, but it will tear up the wood around the nail head so it is not recommended for finish work. Make sure to grab one of these before your next home improvement or woodworking project!.

short_description: The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries, and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend playtime! Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends. Each food and utensil item included is constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that can be used during indoor or outdoor play.

title: ASR Outdoor 2pc Portable Sluice Box with Gold Panning Backpack Combo Set - Black
short_description: Never again will you have to compromise when it comes to the quality of your travel backpack. With our ASR Outdoor Cotton Canvas Backpack you'll be able to carry as much as you want while at the same time having the quality needed to keep it in good shape while you travel. It will give you a feel of nostalgia with it's vintage charm. The quick release buckles and draw string closure will ease your mind as it will keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily available. The backpack is made out of a high quality cotton canvas. The large central pouch that holds up to 30 Liters or 1830 Cubic Inches.
narrative: Never again will you have to compromise when it comes to the quality of your travel backpack. With our ASR Outdoor Cotton Canvas Backpack you'll be able to carry as much as you want while at the same time having the quality needed to keep it in good shape while you travel. It will give you a feel of nostalgia with it's vintage charm. The quick release buckles and draw string closure will ease your mind as it will keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily available. The backpack is made out of a high quality cotton canvas. The large central pouch that holds up to 30 Liters or 1830 Cubic Inches. There are two large side pouches that are large enough to hold a water bottle and use zippers and a velcro secure flap to keep your items secure. Finally it has a large front pouch that also uses a zippers and a velcro secure flap to contain your miscellaneous items. Inside the backpack, we've included a sluice box for gold prospecting. This sluice box unfolds to a full sized 50" sluice box, and easily folds back up into just 15" so you'll be able to carry and store it with ease. It even comes with miner's moss and carpet already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own. In addition to the carpet and moss, we've included a handy detachable shoulder strap so you can easily carry it from place to place as you go. Due to its simplicity and portability, this is a great sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike!

Crucibles can come in handy for a number of hobby projects, including jewelry making, metalworking and gold prospecting. Just add your metal in, melt it and get to work! short_description: Going treasure hunting? Then you need the SE 8.5" Green Sand Scooper! This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure. Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, scoop up some sand in the target area and run the metal detector over the scoop. Then, gently shake the scoop side to side, allowing the sand to fall out of the holes and uncover the treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt!.

title: ASR Outdoor Prospecting Magnifying Tweezer & Vial Kit - 4x Magnification
short_description: The ASR Outdoor Tweezer and Vial Combo Set is the essential utilitarian tweezer for inspecting not only gold but precious gems and minerals as well. The tweezers feature an optical-quality glass lens with 4x magnification, these tweezers will show fine detail without distortion. short_description: Designed to be durable and strong, the 1100 Paracord is for heavy-duty jobs at camp or in the field. The 5.5 mm, 16-strand construction makes it double the strength of our 550 Paracord. It’s tough cordage that offers less stretch – ideal for securing shelter and gear. Use it to tie down tents, tarps, luggage, or equipment on vehicles, kayaks, and rafts. Its burly thickness allows for easier handling when used as a bear hang, clothesline, lightweight anchor (20 lbs or less), and kayak towline. Whether camping, hunting, or paddling, this reflective paracord works hard all day and all night.

title: Home Hobby Chasing & Goldsmith Hammer
short_description: The SE 8331JH chasing and goldsmith hammer has two flat faces on each end with one end at 1” diameter and the other at 5/8” diameter. The flat faces are ideal for any crafts including forging or flattening of precious metals, including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. You can also use these flat faces on a round precious metal surface to even it out. This hammer is great for jewelers, machinists, artisans, metalsmiths, and more. It features a wooden handle for a comfortable grip.

short_description: Calling all little cops in training! This fun police themed playset includes one play mat, two police vehicles and five traffic signs. Toddlers and little kids will love zooming all over town, policing the next emergency with the friction powered toy car and airplane toy! Featuring an airplane toy and toy car, these police themed vehicles are easy to play with once they understand the mechanics of friction power! With a simple pull, little ones can crime fight all across the city from one accident to the next! In addition to the toy car and airplane toy, this play set comes with an awesome felt play mat.

title: ASR Outdoor Brass Probe Tool
short_description: Treasure Hunt like a pro with the ASR Outdoor Brass Coin Probe! This handy tool is designed to pinpoint your findings once your metal detector alerts you of the treasure. Once you've found the spot, use a small digging tool to dig a plug and remove the plug. Then you should re-scan the area with your detector to make sure the treasure was not in the plug you removed. Then use your brass coin probe to slowly probe the small hole you created! This tool is ideal for hunting treasure because brass is non-marring, so you won't ruin the artifact, metal or coin you're searching for. This probe is 9.5" in length, has a rod size of 6.

short_description: The Emergency Hammer is a tool every driver should have! It is designed to help prevent being trapped in a wrecked or submerged vehicle. Should the doors become jammed shut or a seat belt locked after an accident, the double-sided steel hammer points allow the driver to easily shatter side and rear windows, while a safeguarded razor blade cuts easily through safety belts for a quick escape. This emergency hammer includes a black mounting bracket for quick access installation to a roof, dash, or console. The bright orange plastic body make the hammer easy to find and a glow-in-the-dark pin helps spotting in the dark or murky water easier.

short_description: We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site. The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter.
narrative: We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site. The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter. On the gold recovery front, this kit offers both panning or sluicing options; choose from either 10 inch or 12 inch dual riffle gold pans, or mini rubber sluice box! A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning, the mini aluminum sluice box measures 12 inches with no assembly required; aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold. All gold mining tools included in this gold panning kit covers you from start to finish in the gold recovery process, from processing and classification to retrieval and storage. Gold prospecting equipment includes: scoop, 1/30 classifier screen, and x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 8lbs magnetic classifier, scoop, magnifying tweezers, sniffer bottle, pipettes, drawstring backpack, paydirt and glass storage vials. Lightweight and compact, this gold panning kit is great for fine gold recovery work at home, but is also ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, or for hiking into remote claim sites locations where limited equipment is the only option. The kit also makes a great gift for new gold panning hobbyists, for packing with your camping gear or as a fun activity to do with kids. Good luck!

short_description: Knife Collectors Rejoice! Now introducing the special edition etched dagger set: Wolf, Eagle, and Dragon Daggers with their respective sheaths. This is a beautifully crafted dagger set featuring 3 different outdoor graphic scenes etched onto the Scabbard and handle. The handles' pommels are made with impressive animal heads of the distinctive graphic depicted throughout the handle. Each ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Animal Dagger has a handle in the shape of it's respective animal and the blade is acid etched with a impressively detailed design. Both the handle and sheath feature a colorful and majestic design depicting the spirit of the animal. The blade of these daggers are 8 inches length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel.
narrative: Step into a world of fantasy and medieval design with this 3-piece decorative dagger set , featuring bold Dragon, Wolf, and Eagle themed daggers . Designed for collectors and fans of fantasy-inspired décor, this set combines detailed craftsmanship with striking visual appeal, making it a standout addition to any collection or display.

Each dagger showcases an ornate animal head handle , paired with a matching themed scabbard and a finely etched stainless steel blade . The detailed artwork and engraved designs give each piece a unique identity while maintaining a cohesive fantasy aesthetic across the full set.

Crafted with 440 stainless steel blades , these daggers offer durability while maintaining their primary purpose as display pieces and collectible items . The combination of etched blades, sculpted handles, and vibrant scabbard artwork creates a premium look ideal for shelves, cases, or themed rooms.

This fantasy dagger set is perfect for a wide range of enthusiasts, including DnD players, cosplay fans, medieval décor collectors, and knife collectors . Whether you're building a display, enhancing a costume setup, or searching for a unique gift, this set delivers strong visual impact and collector appeal.

These knives are truly unique and are sure to amaze and delight anyone who sets their eyes on it. This set is a must-have for any knife lover, and will display prominently anywhere that it is placed; this set truly makes for a great gift for the knife collector who has it all or is just beginning to collect

short_description: Going treasure hunting? Then you need the SE 8.5" Orange Sand Scooper! This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure. Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, scoop up some sand in the target area and run the metal detector over the scoop. Then, gently shake the scoop side to side, allowing the sand to fall out of the holes and uncover the treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt!.

short_description: The ASR Outdoor Orange Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Shovel with lanyard hole is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, sieves and more, to help increase your gold recovery efforts! Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector.
narrative: The ASR Outdoor Orange Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Shovel with lanyard hole is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, sieves and more, to help increase your gold recovery efforts! Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector. The ASR Outdoor plastic gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop or shovel is made from reinforced, heavy duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come! In addition to the sand scoop’s formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a bright and vibrant orange color. The vivid color choice is purposeful, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals. And, when you’re not using the gold panning tool alongside your gold rush sluice box, metal detector, gold pans, sieves and other gold prospecting equipment, the hand shovel can be used in your backyard for gardening purposes, or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden. The sand scoop of shovel also includes a lanyard hole at the top of the handle, giving you many convenient carrying options. If treasure hunting or gold panning is a favorite past-time, or it’s a new hobby that you’re just digging into, be sure to add one of the ASR Outdoor Orange Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Shovels with lanyard hole to your gold prospecting equipment! It will help you to better sort, spot and recover any gold nuggets or other valuable minerals via it’s bright orange color, sturdy construction and smaller sampling size.

short_description: Wherever you are, the last thing you want are pesky bugs and insects bothering you, your friends and family or your guests. To ward off mosquitoes, fruit flies, gnats, moths and more, employ the ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper with Hanging Hook.
narrative: While summer and warmer temperatures usually mean barbecues, pool days, patio parties, outdoor dinners, camping and numerous other outdoor activities; unfortunately, this warm weather also usually means bugs! Wherever you are, the last thing you want are pesky bugs and insects bothering you, your friends and family or your guests. To ward off mosquitoes, fruit flies, gnats, moths and more, employ the ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper with Hanging Hook. Plugging into any standard outlet, you’ll have endless hours of 360-degree bug zapping action at your fingertips indoors or out. Simply place on a flat surface or hang with the convenient metal hook and let it go to work while you carry on with your day or evening. Emitting a 365nm wavelength to attract unwanted insects or bugs, the mosquito bug zapper lantern covers up to approximately 400 square feet and kills them with a 1000 V high voltage shock. If you’re worried about the high voltage interior power grid, don’t fret. The UV light electric power grid is completely surrounded by durable, ABS plastic to ensure your little ones and pets won’t be hurt if they touch it. What’s also great about this mosquito killer tool is that is eco-friendly, requiring no use of toxic substances, pesticides or harmful chemicals, making it an environmentally-friendly choice for your home, pool deck, patio, cabin, cottage, campsite, RV, motor home and more. The ASR Outdoor mosquito killer bug zapper lamp is exceptionally easy to keep clean, as it features a detachable tray at the bottom of the device for removing dead bugs and insects; simply pop it off and dispose of dead bugs, rinse as needed, and reattach to bug zapping device; easy and effective! Lastly, the ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper with Hanging Hook is also incredibly quiet; no more hunting with useless plastic fly swatters, chasing mosquitoes or annoying buzzing interruptions, the bug zapper will effectively, efficiently and quietly ward off unwanted pesky bugs and insects for hours on end at your desired location. Dimensions: 8.25” tall x 4” wide; Cord: 55” long (included)
feature_bullets: SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.25” tall x 4” wide; Weight: 1.25lbs; Cord: 55” long (included); Material: ABS plastic; Color: Black

title: ASR Tactical Full Tang Clip Point Blade Slim Kydex Sheath Hook Handle - Chrome

short_description: The ASR Tactical clip point blade has a super-fine point tip, making it ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense. With a blade of just 3.5” in length and an overall length of 8.25”, it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack or purse for quick deployment. Our full tang blade features an ergonomic handle with a finger hook and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don’t need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too.

This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors! Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts.
feature_bullets: FULL TANG FIXED KNIFE – Our full tang fixed blade knife is made of one solid piece of metal that constitutes the blade and runs down the handle as well, making it incredibly sturdy and durable.
COMPACT SIZE – The blade itself measures 3.5” and the overall length is 8.25” so you can store it in small spaces like pockets, backpacks, bags or purses.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Made of heavy-duty 3CR13 stainless steel that won’t rust, this knife is great for use indoors or outdoors, rain or shine. The ergonomic handle features a finger hook and decorative holes.
KYDEX SHEATH – The ASR Tactical knife comes with a sturdy black slim Kydex sheath that features a metal pocket clip so you can easily affix it inside your pocket.
